title: HEART SHAPED CANDLE IN GLASS HOLDER MUM IN A MILLION MOTHERS DAY GIFT
features: Heart-shaped candles in glass jar holder makes a lovely gift.
description: Product description Mother's Day pen and keychain gift set make shopping for Mother's Day gifts easy. Featuring an Epoxy coated Metal keyring with the graphics "Wonderful Mum" Great for attaching to keys and bags. Each set also includes a black ABS ballpen with coloured blush pink or pink wrap. Packaged Dimensions:8.5x19x1.7cm Product Dimensions(Keyring):4.5x0.2x4.9cm Product Dimensions(Pen):14x1.2cm Packaged Weight: 0.7kg Materials:Epoxy coated metal Packaging:Packed in clear pvc tray Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials. Do not leave unattended. Monitor burn time. Extinguish before leaving the room or going to sleep. Never burn for more than 4 hours at a time. Dispose of candle remnants responsibly.
